---
title: "Session 1: Overview of Reproducibility Practices in Scientific Research"
---

# Summary

In this session, we will review the key components of reproducibility in scientific research and experience the reproducible workflow with an example project. We will cover three main topics: (i) project organization, (ii) reproducible workflow, and (iii) documentation. By the end of this session, you will have a better understanding of the core practices for reproducibility in scientific research and how to apply them in your own research projects.



# Section
+ Introduction to reproducibility 

+ Workflow

+
